title: MCDF manifest.json
description: Cryptographic inventory of a container. Hashes cover ciphertext for encrypted members, so integrity is verifiable without decryption.

hash_algorithm.description: Digest used for every entry in `files`.

files.description: Map of container-relative path to lowercase hex digest. Excludes manifest.json, audit.log, audit.checkpoint and signatures/*.

propertyNames.description: Relative path, forward slashes, no leading / and no '..' segment.
